title: rhamnus cornifolia var. denudata
intro: Rhamnus cornifolia var. denudata, also known as bare-stemmed buckthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China, with a history of traditional medicinal use. The plant is valued for its antiphlogistic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Rhamnus cornifolia var. denudata are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support kidney function. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for oral consumption, and it is also used in herbal remedies, such as teas and tinctures.
